title: entandrophragma delevoyi
intro: Entandrophragma delevoyi, also known as Delevoy's mahogany or Delevoy's upunze, is a tree species native to the Democratic Republic of Congo. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Entandrophragma delevoyi include treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant may involve drying the bark or leaves and then using them in infusions or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
